channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: SEVENTEEN wraps up ‘NEW_’ world tour with energetic concert in Bulacan, Philippines
item.description: K-pop supergroup SEVENTEEN brought their highly anticipated ‘NEW_’ world tour to a spectacular close with a show-stopping performance at the Philippine Sports Stadium in Bulacan on March 21, 2026. The...

item.title: Trump issues ultimatum over Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing Iran-US conflict
item.description: The conflict between the United States and Iran, ongoing since 28 February, has escalated further as former President Donald Trump threatened to target Iran’s major power plants unless the Strait of H...

item.title: Analysing the Roles of Iran, Israel and US Leaders in the West Asia Conflict
item.description: The ongoing conflict in West Asia involves Iran, Israel, and the United States, with the actions of their leaders shaping the course of the crisis. Ramachandra Guha critically examines the roles of Ir...

item.title: Labor wins in a landslide as One Nation overtakes Liberals in South Australia, signalling major realignment on the right
item.description: South Australia’s political landscape has changed dramatically following the 2026 state election. Peter Malinauskas’s Labor government secured a resounding second term, winning around 33 of the 47 sea...

item.title: Democrats demand transparency as US-Israel conflict with Iran deepens
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US-Israel alliance and Iran has reached a new intensity as Iranian missile strikes hit southern Israel and targeted a US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean. The esca...

item.title: 70-year-old Fallbrook resident charged in fatal shooting of landscaper after confrontation
item.description: Authorities in San Diego County have charged 70-year-old Michael Anthony Burke of Fallbrook with murder following a deadly shooting that killed a landscaper and injured another man. The incident occur...

item.title: Young Hyderabad Doctor Dies By Suicide After Family Dispute Over Pet Adoption
item.description: A young doctor from Hyderabad tragically took her own life after what appears to be a family disagreement over adopting a cat as a pet. According to preliminary police details reported by local source...

item.title: Hannah and Jared Schmidt win silver medals at Craigleith World Cup ski cross event
item.description: Ottawa-based ski cross siblings Hannah and Jared Schmidt both captured silver medals at the penultimate World Cup stop hosted at Craigleith Ski Club near Collingwood, Ontario, marking their first podi...

item.title: Trump gives Iran deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz amid Iran-Israel missile attacks
item.description: US President Donald Trump don give Iran 48 hours to make the Strait of Hormuz dey open for shipping, otherwise him talk say dem go destroy Iranian energy infrastructure. This come as Tehran don carry ...

item.title: Police Shoot One Suspect Dead, Injure Two During Robbery Attempt in Nairobi
item.description: On the evening of Saturday, 21 March 2026, Nairobi North Sub-Region police were on routine foot patrol along Wangari Maathai Road when they received a tip-off from a vigilant member of the public abou...

item.title: Iranian Missile Strikes on Southern Israel Cause Over 100 Injuries Amid Escalating War
item.description: On Saturday, two Iranian missiles struck southern Israel, marking the most destructive attack in the three-week-old war between US-Israel and Iran. The missiles hit residential areas in Arad and Dimon...

item.title: Mary Mniwasa: Her Career and Contributions as First Female Acting CEO at Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange
item.description: Mary Stephen Mniwasa, the Chief Legal Counsel at the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE), has made a big mark in Tanzania's capital markets through her long career starting in 2007. She climbed from Co...

item.title: Peso Hits Record Low, Roblox Faces Safety Concerns, and Other Top Stories This Week
item.description: This week, the Philippine peso slumped to a record-low P60 against the US dollar, sparking concerns about the country's economy. Meanwhile, the Department of Health's undersecretary's brother was link...

item.title: Guy Garvey on Elbow, Family Life and Finding Joy in Simplicity
item.description: In a candid interview ahead of Elbow’s headline performance for the Teenage Cancer Trust at the Royal Albert Hall, frontman Guy Garvey reflects on nearly three decades with the band, fatherhood, and t...

item.title: Kucherov’s Performance Leads Lightning to Victory Over Oilers
item.description: Nikita Kucherov's stellar performance, with two goals and two assists, helped the Tampa Bay Lightning defeat the Edmonton Oilers 5-2. Kucherov's contributions pushed him to the top of the league's sco...

item.title: Highlights from the 2026 Women’s Asian Cup
item.description: The 2026 Women’s Asian Cup has come to an exciting conclusion in Australia, and in celebration of the tournament, we take a look back at some of the standout moments over the past three weeks. From in...

item.title: Heritage regulations can block renovations: what property buyers need to know
item.description: In Cape Town, property buyers and developers often encounter unexpected obstacles when dealing with older homes, particularly those over 60 years old. Even if municipal approvals, zoning, and title de...

item.title: Northern Territory communities brace for heavy rain and damaging winds as Cyclone Narelle returns
item.description: Northern communities across the Northern Territory are bracing for the second impact of Tropical Cyclone Narelle, which reintensified over the weekend. The cyclone has moved across the Gulf of Carpent...

item.title: Arab Nations Urge Iran to Halt Attacks Amid Rising Regional Tensions
item.description: Following a high-level meeting in Riyadh, top diplomats from across the Arab and Islamic world don issue serious warning to Iran, demanding an immediate stop to the recent missile and drone attacks ca...

item.title: Economic fallout from the prolonged US-Israel war on Iran: soaring energy prices, inflation risks and global growth concerns
item.description: Three weeks into the US and Israeli military campaign against Iran, which began with airstrikes that killed Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, the conflict has escalated beyond initial expectation...
